summary: SINGLE_FOCUS unit-square contingency table: 4 always_redraw cells (TP/FN yellow/red on left H column, FP/TN orange/blue on right ¬H column) update via 3 ValueTrackers (prior, P(E|H), P(E|¬H)). Sweep through 5 (prior, likelihoods) configs including the rare-disease case. Right column has live values + posterior.
